input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.13.2.2
            TITLE: (ev only) the vehicle may be fully charged

            CONTENT:
            rule D.13.2.2: (EV only) The vehicle may be fully charged
D.13.2.2 (EV only) The vehicle may be fully charged

final_answer: (EV only) The vehicle may be fully charged
